generated_oml:
instance VehicleSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for real-time data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSensors
]

instance VehicleSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor-collected data from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler, MonitoringSystemEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design model for physical dimensions like wheel sizes and chassis shapes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADSystemEnabler, SimulationEngineEnabler
]

instance DynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model described by differential equations for system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler, CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler
]

instance CADSystemEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design system for geometric modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance SimulationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Differential equation-based simulation engine for dynamic analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithmEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for parameter estimation using real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance MonitoringSystemEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitoring system for performance validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithm for anomaly identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller for system monitoring and control"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimator for system state inference"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimizer for performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OptimizationViolationInsight, CorrectiveAction
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations to model PT behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalysisInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms for anomaly identification"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimators for system state inference"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateInferenceInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization tools for performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violation in Physical Twin"
]

instance OptimizationViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected optimization violation in Physical Twin"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly identified by fault detection algorithms"
]

instance PredictiveAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of Physical Twin behavior"
]

instance StateInferenceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System state inferred by state estimators"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance optimization insights generated by optimizers"
]

instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Initiate corrective actions on Physical Twin when violations are detected"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CarEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Car as Physical Twin with mechanical components including wheels, chassis, and structural elements. Operational domain is automotive engineering, requiring dynamic modeling via differential equations to analyze forces affecting movement beyond static CAD capabilities."
    base:contains WheelComponent, ChassisComponent, StructuralElementsComponent
]

instance WheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Wheel component of the Physical Twin car"
]

instance ChassisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Chassis component of the Physical Twin car"
]

instance StructuralElementsComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural elements of the Physical Twin car"
]
